paragraphs.text: 暑假到了，妈妈给我报了游泳班。第一天去游泳池，我很紧张。
paragraphs.translation: Summer vacation arrived, Mom signed me up for swim class. On the first day at the pool, I was very nervous.

paragraphs.text: 教练教我们先在水里憋气，然后学漂浮。我试了好几次，终于成功了！
paragraphs.translation: The coach taught us to hold our breath underwater first, then learn to float. I tried many times and finally succeeded!

paragraphs.text: 学了一周，我已经能游五米了。教练说我进步很快。我要继续努力！
paragraphs.translation: After a week of learning, I can already swim five meters. The coach said I'm improving fast. I will keep working hard!
